title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving between Accounts linked to different Tenants
scenario: Support/App data does not update correctly when switching between accounts linked to different tenants in Poly Lens Menu
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Log in with Account A (Tenant A).
3. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
4. Verify that the App screen displays Tenant A information.
5. Log out of Account A from the Account screen.
6. Log in with Account B (Tenant B).
7. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
8. Verify that the App screen now displays Tenant B information.
expected: After switching accounts, the Support > App screen correctly updates to show the tenant information corresponding to the currently logged-in account (Tenant A info for Account A, Tenant B info for Account B).
